reviewed-commit.evidence: Example only: reviewed commit recorded as example-commit-or-tag.

local-release-check.evidence: Example only: npm run release:check passed in the public example workspace.

remote-checks-reviewed.notes: Review CI, Dependency Review, and OpenSSF Scorecard on the final cutover commit.

release-candidate-bundle.notes: Render from the private release-gate status and operator evidence files during cutover.

manifest-rendered.notes: Render the production-host manifest immediately before App registration.

app-created.notes: Create or verify the production 6529bot App in the operator GitHub account.

app-credentials-stored.notes: Move generated credentials directly into the bot runtime secret store.

installation-scope-reviewed.notes: Start with selected repositories for dogfood.

aws-iam-reviewed.notes: Review least-privilege policy artifacts in the private operator workspace.

ledger-schema-applied.notes: Apply the schema from the operator environment.

budget-policies-applied.notes: Apply reviewed central budget policies or document conservative environment caps.

model-prices-applied.notes: Example only: a dogfood-only release may keep conservative default estimates until provider price rows are reviewed.

runtime-secrets-present.notes: Record presence checks only, never secret values.

container-image-reviewed.notes: Example only: direct Node dogfood may defer container image evidence.

server-deployed-noop.notes: Deploy noop mode before enabling worker dispatch.

preflight-strict.notes: Run strict preflight from the release-candidate environment.

webhook-acceptance.notes: Verify invalid signatures, ping, and dry-run replay.

worker-enabled-conservative.notes: Enable worker traffic only after noop verification.

run-control-enforced.notes: Enable durable run-control claims or explicitly defer enforcement.

public-dashboard-wired.notes: Deploy the public dashboard or explicitly defer it in release notes.

admin-bridge-wired.notes: Wire private admin routes through server-side HMAC signing.

admin-snapshot-reviewed.notes: Run the private admin snapshot before exposing admin dashboards.

alerts-deliver.notes: Verify alert dry-runs and one operator-owned delivery channel.

repo-config-validated.notes: Validate the dogfood target repository config from reviewed base-ref content.

limited-initial-review.notes: Enable limited initial-review dogfood only after command-only evidence is healthy.

rollback-tested.notes: Exercise no-spend rollback controls before live dogfood traffic.

security-review-complete.notes: Complete the manual security review checklist for the cutover commit.

release-decision-recorded.notes: Record approve, approve with follow-up, defer, or block.
